name: Terraform MCP
description: Official HashiCorp MCP server connecting AI assistants to Terraform Registry APIs for live provider docs, module search, and HCP Terraform workspace management.

skills.name: Registry Provider Lookup
skills.description: Search Terraform Registry for providers, modules, and policies with real-time docs instead of stale training data.

skills.name: Manage HCP Workspaces
skills.description: Create, update, and delete HCP Terraform or Terraform Enterprise workspaces, set variables, tags, and trigger runs.

skills.name: Generate IaC Configs
skills.description: Produce accurate Terraform configurations grounded in live provider schema and version metadata from the Registry.
